# Superserve

> Superserve is a sandbox and VM provider powered by Firecracker micro-VMs. Create on-demand VMs with sub-200ms boot, checkpoint/rollback/fork primitives, file operations, and command execution.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.superserve.ai/introduction): What Superserve is - Firecracker micro-VMs, sub-200ms boot, checkpoint/rollback/fork, file upload/download, command execution, VM state machine.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.superserve.ai/quickstart): Create your first VM - install the CLI, authenticate, create a VM, exec commands, upload files, checkpoint, fork, rollback.
- [Authentication](https://docs.superserve.ai/authentication): API key auth - get a key from the dashboard, SUPERSERVE_API_KEY env var, X-API-Key header, CLI login.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.superserve.ai/troubleshooting): Common issues - VM stuck in CREATING, command timeouts, file upload failures, rollback issues, auth failures, SSH problems.
- [VMs](https://docs.superserve.ai/vms): VM lifecycle - state machine (CREATING, RUNNING, STOPPED, SLEEPING, DEAD), stop vs sleep, command execution, file operations, SSH.
- [Checkpoints](https://docs.superserve.ai/checkpoints): Checkpoint, rollback, and fork - snapshotting VM state, rolling back to checkpoints, forking VMs into parallel copies, fork trees.
- [CLI](https://docs.superserve.ai/cli): CLI reference - vm create/list/get/delete/stop/start/sleep/wake, exec, ssh, files upload/download, checkpoint create/list/delete, rollback, fork.
- [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.superserve.ai/sdk): TypeScript client - vms, exec, files, checkpoints, rollback, fork, configuration, error handling.
- [Python SDK](https://docs.superserve.ai/python-sdk): Python client - vms, exec, files, checkpoints, rollback, fork, configuration, error handling.
